Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement workout chart assignments and role-based permissions

- Add WorkoutPlanChartAssignments module with full CRUD operations
- Create DietPlanAssignments service/controller for diet plan to member assignments  
- Implement RolesGuard and @Roles decorator for RBAC
- Add Permissions enum with role-to-permissions mapping
- Add BranchAccessGuard for branch-level access control
- Enhance entities with template fields \(workout_templates, diet_plans\)
- Add NotificationType enum with comprehensive notification methods
- Add GoalSchedule and GoalScheduleMilestones entities
- Add WorkoutTemplateExercise equipment tracking

Impact: 40+ new files, enables role-based workout/diet assignments
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: consolidate ADMIN and GYM_OWNER roles into single ADMIN role

Merged GYM_OWNER into ADMIN since they represent the same access level
\(gym owner\). Simplified role hierarchy from 5 to 4 roles:
SUPERADMIN > ADMIN > TRAINER > MEMBER

Changes:
- Remove GYM_OWNER from UserRole enum in permissions.enum.ts
- Update ROLE_PERMISSIONS mapping \(merged GYM_OWNER permissions into ADMIN\)
- Simplify role checks in 11 services \(goals, workouts, diet, progress, etc.\)
- Update BranchAccessGuard to use single ADMIN check
- Remove GYM_OWNER from controller @Roles\(\) decorators
- Update documentation \(CLAUDE.md, project_description.md, etc.\)
EOF
\)")

docs: update Swagger with realistic request/response examples

EOF
